TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Tayak_plahan_ka_tatak, title = Tayak_plahan_ka_tatak, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Tayak_plahan_ka_tatak} }

S.FORM: Tayak plahan ka tatak aring sraral qani hya ga, ini kta iyal misu qani la, nanu' yasa qu cyux naha' kblayun kya qalang na ulay kya Momoyama song misu qani. s'agal naha kkbalay balay Tayal sraral, nanu' pshiluq quw hiluq . ya qasa lga, mpcisal kya qu Tayal lga, niwan nuyx nya pksawbihun uziy qu inlungan na Tayal uziy. ru ktan kya uziy qu ppsbaq 'laqi' gaga na Tayal uziy. niwan nyux nya' pslhingun p'ubuy uziy qu gaga qnxan Tayal sraral uziy.

Tayak plahan ka tatak aring sraral qani hya ga, ini kta iyal misu qani la, nanu' yasa qu cyux naha' kblayun kya qalang na ulay kya Momoyama song misu qani. s'agal naha kkbalay balay Tayal sraral, nanu' pshiluq quw hiluq . ya qasa lga, mpcisal kya qu Tayal lga, niwan nuyx nya pksawbihun uziy qu inlungan na Tayal uziy. ru ktan kya uziy qu ppsbaq 'laqi' gaga na Tayal uziy. niwan nyux nya' pslhingun p'ubuy uziy qu gaga qnxan Tayal sraral uziy.
S.PHON: tajak plaħan ka tatak ariŋ s~ɕraral qani ħja ɣa, ini kta ijal mis~ɕu qani la, nanuʔ jas~ɕa qu ʦ~ʨjux naħaʔ kβlajun kja qalaŋ na ulaj kja momojama s~ɕoŋ mis~ɕu qani. s~ɕʔaɣal naħa kkβalaj βalaj tajal s~ɕraral, nanuʔ ps~ɕħiluq quw ħiluq . ja qas~ɕa lɣa, mpʦ~ʨis~ɕal kja qu tajal lɣa, niwan nujx nja pks~ɕawβiħun uzij qu inluŋan na tajal uzij. ru ktan kja uzij qu pps~ɕβaq ʔlaqiʔ ɣaɣa na tajal uzij. niwan njux njaʔ ps~ɕlħiŋun pʔuβuj uzij qu ɣaɣa qnxan tajal s~ɕraral uzij.
